modmenu.descriptionTranslation.creeper-c: Creepers now ask for permission before they explode. You decide.
creeper-consent-mod.screen.title: Creeper Consent Required
creeper-consent-mod.screen.alien.line1: ᛏ ᚫ ᛟ ᛉ ᛇ ᛈ
creeper-consent-mod.screen.alien.line3: ᚦ ᛚ ᛗ ᛝ ᛞ ᛟ
creeper-consent-mod.screen.question: Do you consent to this explosion?
creeper-consent-mod.message.out_of_range: You are no longer in blast range. Decision cancelled.
creeper-consent-mod.log.sent_screen: Consent screen sent to %s for creeper #%d
creeper-consent-mod.log.invalid_entity: Received consent response for unknown entity #%d from %s — ignoring.
creeper-consent-mod.log.out_of_range: %s responded but is out of blast range of creeper #%d — ignoring.
